zh.lifeSummary: Arnal de Brocas是Bernard de Brocas, LCT7-DVK和Mrs Bernard de Brocas, GX9W-ZT9的兒子，於1170年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾黑爾波內 聖 約翰。他於1200年之前與Mrs Arnal de Brocas在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Brocas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  French: locative name from Brocas in Les Landes, SW France.

variants.name: Brookhouse
meanings: English: topographic name for a house by a stream, from Middle English brok(e) ‘brook’ + hous ‘house’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Brookhouse in Laughton (Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Arnal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Arnal de Brocas was born in 1170, in Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Bernard de Brocas, LCT7-DVK and Mrs Bernard de Brocas, GX9W-ZT9. He married Mrs Arnal de Brocas before 1200, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ru.lifeSummary: Arnal de Brocas родился в 1170 г. в местности ширборн ст джон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Bernard de Brocas, LCT7-DVK и Mrs Bernard de Brocas, GX9W-ZT9.
